summary: Matriz Dinámica de Producción - All backend and frontend features fully tested and working. Backend: 25/25 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified including filters, metric toggle, row expansion, column configuration, navigation, and sticky columns.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/reportes-produccion/matriz returns 200 with all required fields
Backend: Matriz has columnas, filas, totales_columna, total_general, filtros_disponibles
Backend: Matriz columnas is list of estado strings
Backend: Matriz total_general has registros and prendas
Backend: Matriz totales_columna has registros/prendas per column
Backend: Matriz fila has item, hilo, celdas, total, detalle
Backend: Matriz fila item format is 'Marca - Tipo - Entalle - Tela'
Backend: Matriz fila celdas has registros/prendas per estado
Backend: Matriz detalle has id, n_corte, estado, prendas, modelo, ruta, urgente, es_hijo, fecha_entrega
Backend: Matriz filter by ruta_id adapts columns to ruta's etapas
Backend: Matriz filter by marca_id works
Backend: Matriz solo_activos=true excludes CERRADA registros
Backend: Matriz solo_activos=false includes all registros
Backend: Matriz solo_atrasados=true returns only overdue lots
Backend: Matriz solo_fraccionados=true returns only fractioned lots
Backend: Matriz filtros_disponibles has marcas, tipos, entalles, telas, hilos, rutas, modelos
Backend: Matriz total_general.registros matches sum of fila totals
Backend: Matriz totales_columna matches sum of celda values
Backend: Matriz fila total matches sum of its celdas
Backend: Matriz detalle count matches total registros
Backend: Matriz requires authentication (returns 401 without token)
Frontend: /reportes/matriz page loads with filters, metric toggle, column config
Frontend: All 7 filter dropdowns present (Ruta, Marca, Tipo, Entalle, Tela, Hilo, Modelo)
Frontend: Toggle switches present (Solo activos, Solo atrasados, Solo fraccionados)
Frontend: Registros/Prendas metric toggle works - values change correctly
Frontend: Summary badges show items, registros, prendas counts
Frontend: Matrix table displays with Item, Hilo, estado columns, and Total
Frontend: Expanding row shows detalle with Corte, Estado, Prendas, Modelo, Ruta, Entrega, Info, Acción
Frontend: Detalle shows DIV badge for es_hijo registros
Frontend: Detalle shows red date for overdue fecha_entrega
Frontend: Columnas button opens popover with column visibility toggles
Frontend: Column visibility toggles work (14 columns available)
Frontend: Mostrar todas button in column config works
Frontend: Sticky Item and Hilo columns on horizontal scroll
Frontend: TOTALES row shows correct column totals
Frontend: Filter by Ruta adapts columns (12 columns for Pantalon Denim)
Frontend: solo_fraccionados filter shows only fractioned lots (2 registros)
Frontend: Limpiar filtros button appears when filters active
Frontend: Navigation from detalle Traza button to /reportes/trazabilidad/{id} works
Frontend: Navigation from detalle external link to /registros/editar/{id} works
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'Reportes Producción' section with 'Matriz Dinámica' link
Frontend: Matriz Dinámica link is highlighted when on /reportes/matriz page
critical_code_review_comments: Backend endpoint well-structured with proper aggregation logic for grouping by Item (Marca-Tipo-Entalle-Tela) + Hilo
Prendas calculation correctly uses prod_registro_tallas first, then falls back to JSONB tallas field
Frontend uses localStorage for column preferences with key 'matriz-produccion-prefs'
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Sticky columns implemented correctly with CSS sticky positioning
Column reorder and visibility features work via Popover component
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: 4 registros EN_PROCESO (02, 03, 04, 04-1), 1 CERRADA (01). Registro 04 is parent with hijo 04-1 (fraccionado). Two rutas: Pantalon Denim and Polo with different etapas.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Matriz Dinámica de Producción fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoint /api/reportes-produccion/matriz returns matrix data with dynamic columns based on ruta etapas. Frontend page /reportes/matriz has all features: filters (7 dropdowns + 3 toggles), metric toggle (Registros/Prendas), expandable rows with detalle, column visibility/reorder config, sticky columns, totals row, and navigation to trazabilidad and registro. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_matriz_produccion.py with 25 tests.
